summary: Comprehensive testing of Realloc platform completed. This is a complete transformation from Day Learning to Realloc - an AI workforce reallocation platform for enterprise clients. Backend API: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend UI: All core features working correctly including enterprise dashboard with 587 workers, workforce heatmap scatter plot, builder core identification, participant dashboard with personalized training, and community hub.

issues: Placeholder video (Rick Astley) shown instead of actual practitioner briefing - this is acceptable for demo purposes

backend: Workforce heatmap - shows 587 dots, filters work (country, department, category)
Builder core - returns 10+ real candidates with real names
Worker diagnostic - full profile with task decomposition
Task detail - context banner, video, resources, practical scenario, build exercise
frontend: Landing page - Realloc branding, no Day Learning, no Student text, no teal color
Enterprise dashboard - 587 workers, 6 countries, displacement distribution (186/246/155)
Workforce heatmap - scatter plot with 587 dots, country/department/category filters working
Builder core - top 10 candidates with real names (Eugene McDermott, Karen McCulloch, etc.)
Cohort management - 4 cohorts visible (1 active, 3 planned)
Board report preview and download button
Participant dashboard - diagnostic summary, 4 domains, personalized track name
Task page - context banner, video, resources, practical scenario, build exercise, submission section
Community hub - 3 mentors with Meta/NVIDIA/OpenAI credentials
Notification bell visible for both enterprise and participant roles

critical_code_review_comments: Old files from Day Learning (AdminPages.js, ModulePage.js, StudentDashboard.js) may exist in webpack cache - frontend restart should clear these warnings
Video URLs are placeholder (rickroll) - should be replaced with actual practitioner briefing videos for production
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 587 workers, 10 real builder core candidates, 3 mentors, 4 cohorts, activity feed, submissions, and discussions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Realloc platform fully functional. Enterprise features: dashboard shows 587 workers across 6 countries with displacement distribution (186 Rising, 246 Stable, 155 At Risk). Workforce heatmap is a scatter plot with all workers visualized. Builder core shows top 10 candidates with real names from Sagicor. Participant features: personalized dashboard with 4 domains, task pages with context banners, videos, resources, practical scenarios, and build exercises. Community hub shows 3 expert mentors from Meta, NVIDIA, and OpenAI.
